title: Visium CytAssist FFPE v4 -- University of Minnesota TMCs
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ea0h1","text":"The Visium CytAssist Spatial Gene Expression for FFPE assay is designed to analyze mRNA in","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"68lbo","text":"tissue sections derived from formalin fixed \u0026 paraffin embedded (FFPE) tissue samples. The Visium","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fbjij","text":"CytAssist instrument requires a glass slide with intact tissue sections as input. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9ra42","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"sesj","text":"Tissue sections are processed with Visium Spatial Gene Expression assay performed by the University of Minnesota Imaging Center and sequenced by the University of Minnesota Genomics Center.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c2uh1","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"84f5t","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: BCL data from Illumina sequencer is demultiplexed and converted into FASTQ format using bcl2fastq software version 2.20.0
